title: RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The Raman Research Institute (RRI) has officially announced the Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 5 vacancies. As per Advertisement No. 12/2026, eligible candidates possessing M.Sc./M.Tech or B.E./B.Tech qualifications with at least one year of academic research project or industrial work experience in the biophysics field can apply online. Candidates up to 45 years of age are eligible to apply for this temporary position. The online application process is currently open, and interested applicants can submit their applications on or before 20 June 2026. Direct links to download the offi

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.details: Research Assistant: M.Sc./M.Tech or B.E./B.Tech in any field with at least 1 year of academic research project or industrial work experience in biophysics field.

salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA per month

selection_process: Online interview via Zoom or suitable other online platforms
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
